data.title: BNB Surpasses 590 USDT with a 1.99% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 15, 2025, 00:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 590 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 590 USDT, with a narrowed 1.99% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The U.S. Senate passed a spending bill, essentially eliminating the risk of a government shutdown
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Senate passed the Republican spending bill by 62 to 38 votes, basically eliminating the risk of a government shutdown. The bill does not set additional spending limits, allowing Elon Musk's government streamlining plan to advance and ensuring that the government operates until the end of the fiscal year on September 30.
In addition, the Senate will next review Trump's tax reform agenda, and the Democrats cannot use the filibuster procedure to check and balance on this issue. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Bitwise Strategist: MicroStrategy Stock Is the TradFi Equivalent of “Altcoins”
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitwise Chief Investment Strategist Ryan Rasmussen said in an interview that MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock's performance in the traditional financial (TradFi) market is similar to that of altcoins in the crypto market.
Rasmussen pointed out that MicroStrategy's stock price trend is highly correlated with Bitcoin, but with greater volatility, which is similar to the volatility of altcoins in the crypto market compared to Bitcoin. He emphasized that although MicroStrategy is classified as a technology stock or software company in the traditional market, it has essentially become a highly leveraged Bitcoin investment tool.
In addition, MicroStrategy's recently disclosed financial report shows that the total amount of Bitcoin it holds has exceeded 200,000, with a total value of approximately US$16 billion. The company continues to increase its holdings of Bitcoin through debt financing and convertible notes, making its stock one of the alternative investment targets for crypto assets. (The Block)

data.title: Coinbase Derivatives Trading Platform Plans to Launch NGS and ADA Futures, Expected to Launch on March 31
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase Derivatives plans to further expand its derivatives market and has submitted a self-certification application to the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), intending to launch natural gas (NGS) futures and Cardano (ADA) futures.
According to the official announcement, the application is still under review and if approved, it is expected to be officially launched on March 31. This move will make Coinbase Derivatives' product layout in the energy and cryptocurrency derivatives markets more diversified.

data.title: Goldman Sachs mentions cryptocurrency for the first time in its annual shareholder letter, acknowledging increased competition in the industry
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Goldman Sachs Group (Goldman Sachs) mentioned cryptocurrency for the first time in its 2024 annual shareholder letter, calling it one of the important trends in the field of fintech, and pointed out that emerging technologies (including cryptocurrency, distributed ledger technology and artificial intelligence) are intensifying industry competition.
In the letter, Goldman Sachs admitted that some competitors are offering financial products including cryptocurrencies and may be more popular with customers, although Goldman Sachs has not yet officially launched related services. In addition, since the launch of the cryptocurrency trading platform in 2021, Goldman Sachs has continued to explore the application of blockchain technology, and launched a digital asset platform in 2022, and also participated in the testing of the blockchain communication system Canton Network.
However, Goldman Sachs warned that distributed ledger technology and cryptocurrency are still in the early stages and may face cybersecurity risks and other potential challenges. Previously, Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon has repeatedly stated that Bitcoin is a "speculative asset", but he also acknowledged that blockchain technology has the potential to transform the financial system.
(The Block)

data.title: Bank of America Insider Helps Criminals and Illicit Businesses Launder Funds in Massive Global Conspiracy: US Department of Justice

data.title: David Sacks sold over $200 million in digital assets before taking office to avoid conflicts of interest
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The White House issued a memo showing that David Sacks, the director of US artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency affairs, sold more than $200 million in digital asset-related investments through his personal and company Craft Ventures before taking office to reduce potential conflicts of interest. Among them, at least $85 million was directly attributed to Sacks, but Craft Ventures still holds some fund investments involving crypto assets.
Sacks has cleared his holdings of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana and the Bitwise 10 Crypto Index Fund (BITW), and sold his shares in Coinbase (COIN) and Robinhood (HOOD). In addition, he also withdrew from investments related to Multicoin Capital, Blockchain Capital and Bitwise Asset Management, and began to gradually withdraw from holdings in some private digital asset companies. However, Sacks still holds interests in some funds under Craft Ventures, which invest in companies such as BitGo and Lightning Labs. These investments are difficult to fully withdraw due to liquidity restrictions, accounting for less than 3.8% of its total investment assets.
Sacks said the move was intended to avoid any suspicion of conflict of interest and ensure transparency in his decision-making as a government official.

data.title: Crypto password recovery firm Unciphered in turmoil after co-founder’s hidden past emerges
data.description:
The crypto password-cracking company Unciphered is in turmoil over the surfaced sexual assault allegations of one of its co-founders, Morgan Marquis-Boire.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/unciphered-in-turmoil-over-hidden-past/
